# @cascivo/example-react-next

> Next.js App Router example using cascivo

[cascivo.com](https://cascivo.com) · [Docs](https://docs.cascivo.com) · [Storybook](https://storybook.cascivo.com) · [GitHub](https://github.com/urbanisierung/cascivo)

Cascade React + Next.js — example app showing cascivo components in a Next.js App Router project with RSC. Demonstrates `"use client"` boundary placement for signal-driven components.
